reviews.comment:
YPF ACA..... Automóvil club argentino.... El lugar por excelencia de auxilio mecánico. Fui a comprar una linga.... O algo para remolcar el auto. No venden. Entre al shopp, tampoco venden, quise ir al servicio mecánico!! Estaba cerrado. 🤦🤦🤦🤦 De terror.

(Translated by Google)
YPF ACA..... Argentine Automobile Club.... The place par excellence for roadside assistance. I went to buy a tow rope.... Or something to tow the car. They don't sell them. I went into the shop, they don't sell them either, I wanted to go to the service center!! It was closed. 🤦🤦🤦🤦 Terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1LWFXYld3EAE
